units.name: Ghost
units.prompt: Stay cloaked and flank. Prioritize assassinating the enemy damage dealer. Use breach on sentinels to break their defensive posture. Recloak whenever it drops.

units.name: Viper
units.prompt: Place traps on tiles enemies are likely to move through. Use pulse if 2+ enemies are adjacent. Stay near allies for mutual support.

units.name: Bastion
units.prompt: Advance toward the nearest enemy. Use shield_wall facing the direction with the most enemies. If an enemy is adjacent, attack them.

units.name: Warden
units.prompt: Push forward aggressively. Shield_wall facing the enemy cluster. If flanked, turn to face the biggest threat. Attack when possible.

units.name: Hawk
units.prompt: Maintain distance. Use precision_shot on high-value targets — medics first, then damage dealers. Use suppressing_fire if enemies close in.

units.name: Shade
units.prompt: Cloak and move behind enemy lines. Target isolated enemies with shadow_strike. Save breach for the most dangerous enemy. Avoid being caught uncloaked.

actions.thinking: Round 1, I should cloak immediately as advised. All enemies are out of range. I'll cloak first, then move south toward enemy lines to close distance on Bastion.

Round 1 — cloak immediately per orders and tip. Enemies are far (dist 5-6), no threats adjacent. Move toward Hawk (the striker/damage dealer at 1,5) while cloaking. Best move is toward 1,3 to close distance along the column.
No enemies adjacent. Advance toward nearest enemy (Warden at 3,4, dist=4). Move to (2,3) to close distance. Then shield_wall facing N where enemies are.

Round 1, enemies are distant. Warden at (3,4) will likely advance south toward our position. I should move toward center and place a trap on a likely approach path. Moving to (4,2) gets me closer to the action while staying near allies. Then place a trap at (3,3) — the natural path Warden would take advancing toward us.
Bastion is in range at dist 3. I haven't moved yet so precision_shot deals 2dmg. No adjacency to Viper so no suppression penalty. Fire first, then hold position.
Enemies are at dist 2-3, not yet in melee range. Move toward Bastion at (2,3) to close gap — (3,3) puts me adjacent. Shield_wall facing N to block incoming damage from the enemy cluster to the north.

Cloak has 1 turn remaining. Priority is assassinating Hawk (striker = damage dealer). No positions behind Hawk are reachable this turn. However, I can move to (3,4) which is directly behind Warden — breach opportunity. But orders say prioritize Hawk. Hawk faces S, so behind Hawk would be (1,6) which is off-grid. No behind positions available for Hawk. Best play: move to (2,4) to flank Hawk's position, staying cloaked. Actually, let me breach Warden now from (3,4) — that frees up allies and disrupts enemy formation, then next turn I can go after Hawk. Move to (3,4) then breach Warden.

secondAction.addendum: Move away from allies, toward the map edge

actions.thinking: I'm already behind Bastion (facing N, I'm at 2,2 which is south of them). I can breach Bastion right now — I'm adjacent and behind. Breach is more valuable than shadow_strike here since it lets me control Bastion next turn. Cloak has 1 turn remaining so this is good timing. After breach, I should move toward Ghost at (2,4) to stay behind enemy lines.

firstAction.addendum: Move north toward Ghost or attack nearest enemy

actions.thinking: Shade is adjacent at (2,4) — a specter flanking our position. Warden is also adjacent at (3,3). Orders say move north toward Ghost or attack nearest enemy. Shade is the immediate threat at dist=1. If I attack Shade first, then move north to (2,5), I stay aggressive and push toward Ghost's position. Attacking Shade deals 1 dmg. Moving to (2,5) puts me adjacent to Ghost at (3,4) for potential shield_wall support next turn. I lose Fortify by moving, but pressing north fulfills orders.

Warden is at (3,3), distance 2 - within trap range. Place trap on (3,2) to intercept Warden if they advance south toward me. Then move to (5,3) to maintain distance while staying near the action. Shade is at (2,4) moving toward me - trap placement between us is key.

Bastion (sentinel) is adjacent at (2,5), which blocks precision_shot. I need to move away first to use precision_shot. Moving to (0,5) or (1,4) puts distance from Bastion. Moving to (1,4) keeps me off the edge and at dist=2 from Bastion, enabling precision_shot. Ghost is priority but out of range. Bastion is the immediate threat. Move to (1,4) first, then precision_shot Bastion at dist=2 (still in range 2) — but wait, if I moved this turn, precision_shot does only 1dmg. Better to move to (3,5) to gain distance from Bastion while staying on board, but that's toward Ghost. Move to (0,5) puts Bastion at dist=2, precision_shot for 1dmg (moved penalty). Or move to (1,3) — dist from Bastion becomes 2, can fire for 1dmg. No better option: move away to escape adjacency, fire for 1dmg on Bastion.

Orders are to move away from allies and toward map edge. Current position (3,3). Allies at (1,3) and (2,4). Map edges are at x=0,5 and y=0,5. Moving to (4,4) gets me toward the east/north edge and away from allies clustered on the left. Then moving to (4,2) or staying. Actually, valid moves include (4,4) which is toward the northeast edge, away from Hawk@(1,3) and Shade@(2,4). Ghost is adjacent at (3,4) but orders say to move away from allies toward edge — I'll move to (4,4) first, then (4,3) isn't available but (4,2) is. Wait, I can only move once per turn with mv2, meaning up to 2 tiles in one move action. So I can reach (4,4) in one move (diagonal dist=sqrt(2), but grid movement — checking valid tiles: (4,4) is listed as valid). Move to (4,4) to get toward the east edge, away from allies. No second action needed since orders don't specify attacking.

Breach cooldown active, can't breach this turn. Priority: assassinate Hawk (damage dealer). Shade is adjacent to my west at (2,4). I need to get behind Hawk at (1,4). I can move to (2,3) to get behind Shade, but Hawk is the priority. Move to (1,4) puts me behind Hawk — reachable in mv3. From (1,4) I can shadow_strike Hawk at (1,3) for 1dmg without breaking cloak (I'm not cloaked anyway). Actually I'm not cloaked so shadow_strike vs attack — both deal 1dmg adjacent. Move to (1,4) to get behind Hawk, then attack for 1dmg. That positions me for breach next turn when cooldown clears.

I'm at (2,4) facing N with 3HP. Ghost is adjacent at (1,4) facing W — I'm already behind Ghost. Bastion is adjacent at (2,5) facing N — I'm also behind Bastion. Breach is on cooldown. Shadow_strike deals 1dmg and keeps cloak, but I'm not cloaked. Best play: shadow_strike Ghost (already behind, keeps any cloak state), then move away or hit Bastion. Actually, I'm uncloaked so shadow_strike still works — it's range:adjacent only. Ghost is the mobile specter threat. Hit Ghost with shadow_strike first (1dmg, I stay in place), then shadow_strike Bastion for another 1dmg. Both are adjacent and I'm behind both. Two kills possible if they're at 1HP but they're healthy. This maximizes damage output this turn.

Shade is adjacent at (2,4) — attack it first, then I lose fortify if I move. Since orders say attack nearest enemy and Shade is right there, attack Shade now while fortified. Moving would break fortify. Stay put and attack.

Ghost is adjacent at (1,4) — precision_shot is blocked when adjacent to enemy. I'm at 2HP, wounded. Need to disengage first. Move to (0,2) to create distance from Ghost, then use precision_shot on Ghost from range 2. Check: (0,2) to (1,4) = dist sqrt(1+4)=~2.2, out of range 2. Better: move to (3,3) — dist to Ghost(1,4) = sqrt(4+1)=~2.2, also out of range. Move to (2,2): dist to Ghost(1,4) = sqrt(1+4)=~2.2, out of range. Move to (1,1): dist to Ghost(1,4) = 3, out of range. Move to (0,3): dist to Ghost(1,4) = sqrt(1+1)=~1.4, still adjacent-ish but dist=1 means adjacent. Valid move (0,3) is dist 1 from me. Let me use suppressing_fire instead — can target Ghost at (1,4) from current pos, dealing 1dmg and slowing. Actually precision_shot blocked when ADJACENT to enemy Vector, not specter. Ghost is a specter not vector. Viper is the vector at dist 4. So precision_shot IS available! Fire precision_shot on Ghost at (1,4) for 2dmg (haven't moved yet). Then move away.

Orders say move away from allies toward map edge. I'm at (4,4). Allies are at (0,2) and (2,4). Map edge is to the east/north. Moving to (5,5) gets me to the corner edge, away from allies. Viper is at (5,3) so I need to avoid (5,3) adjacency — (5,4) is adjacent to Viper, so avoid that. (5,5) is 2 tiles from Viper, safe. I can reach (5,5) in one move (dist=√2≈1.4, within mv2). Wait as second action.

Warden is 2 tiles away at (5,5) - within range but I can't trap adjacent to enemies. Ghost is critical at (1,4) and needs support but is far. Shade is wounded at (2,4). I should place a trap on a likely movement path. Warden at (5,5) facing N might move toward center. I can move to (4,4) to get closer to the action and place a trap on (3,3) or near Shade's likely path. Actually, there's already a trap at (3,2). I can use pulse if I get adjacent to Warden - moving to (5,4) puts me adjacent to Warden at (5,5), enabling a pulse hit. But pulse only hits if 2+ enemies adjacent. Better to place a trap on a key tile. Move to (4,4) and trap (4,5) to block Warden's advance, or trap near Shade. Let me trap (3,4) which is between Shade and our position - likely movement corridor.

Ghost is at (1,4), critical HP, dist=1, and I'm already behind it (behind tiles = [2,4] = my position). I can breach Ghost to take it out of the fight — they obey me next turn, wasting their action. But Ghost is already critical — shadow_strike would finish it without breaking cloak (if I had cloak, but I'm not cloaked). Actually, I should just shadow_strike Ghost to eliminate it — it's critical and adjacent. That removes a fast flanker threat. Then I'm still at (2,4) adjacent to Bastion at (2,5) — I'm behind Bastion too. Breach cooldown is ready. Breach Bastion to control their action next turn, disrupting their defense. Ghost elimination first, then breach Bastion.

secondAction.addendum: Move away from Viper and allies, wasting your turn

actions.thinking: Shade is wounded at (2,4) and within range - I can attack it. Warden is at (5,5), also in range but healthy. There's already a trap at (3,4). I should attack the wounded Shade to finish it off, then place a trap on a likely enemy path. After attacking Shade, I could move to cut off Warden or place a trap near Warden's likely movement. Shade is at dist=2 which is within my attack range. Let me attack Shade first (wounded, easier kill), then place a trap on (5,4) or (4,5) to intercept Warden.
Orders say to move away from Viper and allies, wasting my turn. Viper is at (4,4), I'm at (2,5). Moving to (0,5) takes me away from both Viper and the action. I'll move there and wait.

Bastion (sentinel) is at (0,5), distance 3 — in range for precision_shot (range ≤2 tiles). Wait, dist=3 exceeds precision_shot range of ≤2. I'm at (0,2) with spd1 (slowed). I can move up to 1 tile. If I move to (0,3), Bastion is at dist=2, bringing it into precision_shot range. I'm not adjacent to Viper so no denial. Move to (0,3) then precision_shot Bastion.

Orders are to move away from allies and toward map edge. I'm at (5,5) which is already at the east edge. Valid moves toward edges away from allies: (5,3) or (5,4) keep me on the east edge. Shade is at (2,4) and Hawk at (0,3), so moving south along x=5 moves away from them. Move to (5,3) to maximize distance from allies.

I'm at 2HP, breach is exhausted. Viper is 2 tiles away — moving adjacent would block my abilities. Bastion is at (0,5) facing W, with behind tile (1,5) reachable. I can move to (1,5) to get behind Bastion and shadow_strike for 1 damage while staying cloaked (if cloaked) or just deal damage. Moving to (1,5) keeps me away from Viper's denial range. Shadow_strike from behind Bastion.

Warden is at (5,3), distance 2 - within my range. I can attack it. Trap at (4,5) already placed. I should place a trap on a tile Warden might move through, or attack Warden directly. Moving to (5,4) puts me adjacent to Warden and lets me attack. But I'd be moving toward an enemy sentinel. Better to use trap at (5,4) to block Warden's path, then stay put or reposition. Actually, trap range is ≤2 tiles - (5,4) is 1 tile away, valid. Place trap at (5,4) to catch Warden if it moves north, then attack Warden from current position since it's in range.

I'm fortified at (5,3) with 50% damage reduction. Viper is 2 tiles away at (4,4) — moving adjacent would trigger denial. Orders say push forward aggressively. If I move to (4,3), I'd be adjacent to Viper at (4,4) which is 1 tile north — that puts me in attack range. But Viper has denial on adjacent, so I need to be careful. Actually, moving to (4,3) puts me adjacent to Viper and I can attack. Alternatively, stay put and use shield_wall to protect allies — Shade is wounded at (1,5). But orders say push forward. Move to (5,4) gets me closer to Viper (now dist=1 diagonally, but diagonal adjacency may not count for melee). Move to (4,3) puts me directly south of Viper — that's adjacent, enabling attack. Risk: Viper denial blocks abilities when adjacent. I'll move to (5,4) to advance toward Viper without being directly adjacent yet, then shield_wall facing N to protect against Viper's likely attack.

Orders say move away from allies and waste my turn. Valid moves away from Viper at (4,4): moving to (2,5) goes further east toward enemies, (0,4) goes south but stays near Hawk. I'll move to (2,5) to satisfy the 'move away' order, losing fortify but following orders.

Both enemies are out of range. Bastion is at dist 4, Viper at dist 5. I need to close distance to get precision_shot range (≤2 tiles). Moving to (2,3) gets me closer to Bastion at (2,5) — dist 2, which is within precision_shot range. I'm at 2HP so staying cautious. Move to (2,3) then shoot Bastion.
Bastion is adjacent and wounded, I'm already behind them (at their west, they face E). Shadow_strike keeps cloak and deals damage. Use shadow_strike now to potentially finish Bastion.

Warden is adjacent at (5,4) - prime pulse target. Check if any other enemies are also adjacent: Hawk is dist 3, Shade is dist 4, so only Warden is adjacent. Pulse hits all units within 1 tile so only Warden. Better to attack Warden directly for 1dmg, then place a trap on a likely enemy path. Hawk at (2,3) will likely advance through (3,3) or (3,4) - (3,4) already has a trap. Place trap at (3,3) to cover Hawk's approach. But I'm adjacent to Warden (enemy Vector), which blocks trap ability due to Denial passive. Wait - I'm Vector not Warden. Warden is a sentinel. My Denial passive blocks enemy abilities. Enemy Warden's adjacency doesn't block my trap. Actually re-reading: Denial blocks adj enemies from using cloak/breach/scan/precision_shot/trap/patch/overclock. That's MY passive affecting ENEMIES, not affecting me. So I can place traps freely. Attack Warden for damage, then place trap at (3,3) to intercept Hawk.

Bastion is wounded and only 2 tiles away — priority target. I haven't moved this turn so precision_shot does full 2dmg. Viper is at distance 3, not adjacent, so no blocking. Shoot Bastion first. Then move to maintain distance from Viper.
Orders say move away from Viper and allies, wasting my turn. Viper is at (4,4). Moving to (0,5) maximizes distance from allies while staying on valid tiles.

I'm adjacent to Viper which means DENIAL blocks my abilities except basic attack. I'm fortified (50% dmg reduction). Attack Viper with basic attack since that works in DENIAL zone. No need to move - staying fortified is better.
Bastion is adjacent at (0,5), critical HP, and I'm already behind them. Shadow_strike keeps cloak and will finish them off. No move needed.

I'm fortified with 50% damage reduction and adjacent to Viper. I'm in Viper's DENIAL zone so shield_wall is blocked. Basic attack still works. Attack Viper now, then stay put to keep fortify active next turn.

Shade is adjacent at (1,5) and wounded — attack to finish. I'm at 1HP with fortify active, so staying put preserves the 50% damage reduction. After attacking Shade, use shield_wall facing E (toward Hawk at (1,3) and Warden at (5,4)) to protect Viper.

Warden is adjacent at (5,4) - I can attack it. Shade is critical at (1,5) and Hawk is at (1,3), both far away. My traps are already covering (3,2),(3,3),(3,4),(4,5). Warden is healthy and adjacent, so attack it. I also want to place a trap on (4,3) or (5,3) to block Warden's movement south. Attack Warden first, then place a trap nearby to control escape routes.

Bastion is critical and in range at dist=3. I'm at (1,3). Precision_shot requires ≤2 tiles, so Bastion at dist=3 is out of range. I need to move closer. Moving to (0,4) puts me at dist=1 from Bastion (0,5) - adjacent, which blocks precision_shot. Moving to (1,4) puts me at dist=2 from Bastion (0,5) - valid for precision_shot. I haven't moved yet so precision_shot deals 2dmg. Bastion is critical so 2dmg should finish it. Viper is at dist=4, not a threat this turn.

1HP critical — survival first. Viper is at dist 4, out of shadow_strike range. Breach unavailable. No enemies adjacent. Best move: close on Viper while staying alive. Move to (3,4) to get closer, then shadow_strike Viper from adjacent won't reach this turn. Move to (4,5) gets me adjacent-diagonal but not adjacent. Move to (3,4) then I'm dist 1 from Viper at (4,4) — adjacent! shadow_strike keeps cloak and does 1 damage. Move to (3,4) first, then shadow_strike Viper.

Warden is adjacent at (5,4) and wounded - attack to finish. Hawk is at distance 3, can't reach this turn. After attacking Warden, I could pulse but Hawk isn't adjacent. Better to attack Warden then move to better position or place a trap on Hawk's likely path.
Viper is at (3,4), distance 2. I'm at (1,4) with 2HP. I can use precision_shot for 2dmg if I haven't moved. Shoot first, then move away to maintain distance.

I'm at (5,4) with 3HP, fortified (50% dmg reduction). Viper is at (3,4) dist=2, so I can't attack yet. Orders say push forward aggressively. Moving to (4,4) closes distance to Viper to 1 tile, putting them in melee range for attack. But caution note says avoid moving adjacent to Viper as abilities will be blocked — however, attack is the goal here. Actually the caution is about MY abilities being blocked by Viper's denial range. I need to close to attack. Move to (4,4) then attack Viper at (3,4) — wait, after moving to (4,4), Viper at (3,4) is dist=1, adjacent. I can attack. But I lose fortify. With 3HP remaining, losing fortify is risky. However orders say push aggressively. Move to (4,4) and attack Viper.

Viper is adjacent at (3,4) and critical — attack to finish it. I'm fortified with 50% damage reduction. Denial zone blocks abilities but basic attack should work. Attack Viper first, then shield_wall facing W to protect Hawk.
Viper is critical at dist=3, within precision_shot range. I haven't moved yet so no penalty. Fire precision_shot for 2dmg to finish Viper, then wait or hold position.

I'm at 1HP - extremely vulnerable. Warden is adjacent at (4,4) wounded. Hawk is at (0,4) dist 3. I need to survive. My Denial passive already blocks some of Warden's abilities while adjacent. I can pulse to hit Warden (1 tile AoE hits adjacent enemies) for 1 damage, potentially finishing the wounded Warden. Then move away from danger. Trap is blocked since I'm adjacent to enemy Vector... wait, I AM the Vector. Trap is blocked when adjacent to enemy Vector, but I'm the Vector. Let me re-read: trap blocked when adjacent to enemy Vector. No enemy Vector exists. So trap is available but Warden is adjacent which means Denial applies to me too? No - Denial affects adjacent ENEMIES. I should pulse to hit wounded Warden, then move away from Hawk's approach path.
